description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, a paved driveway, and a landscaped yard featuring several trees and shrubs. The house has a symmetrical front facade with double-hung windows, a central entryway, and a gable roof. The rear of the house includes a patio area and a small rectangular pool, with additional windows and a chimney visible. The garage is positioned to the left of the main house and is connected by the driveway, which accommodates a parked car. The property is bordered by green lawns and paved walkways, creating a well-maintained residential appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a detached garage, paved driveway, landscaped yard, and a small backyard pool. The house features symmetrical windows, a central entryway, and a gable roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house facade, central entryway, driveway, detached garage, and a car parked in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, driveway, large tree, and the side of the house with additional windows and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, small pool, and the back of the house with French doors and windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garage, side yard, and the house's side elevation with more windows and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, small overhang, and flanking windows; no porch or columns.
